summary: Entrance hall presented in good decorative order throughout, finished with emulsioned walls in white/magnolia and grey tones, oak-effect engineered flooring, white woodwork and a walnut-veneered timber entrance door with brass-effect ironmongery. The hall incorporates a built-in storage/wardrobe recess and integrated smart-home control panel. Walls carry scattered scuff marks and minor surface marks at low to mid level consistent with light wear; flooring and joinery are otherwise sound. Cleaning to a domestic standard required, with dust noted within the storage recess.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered and emulsioned ceiling finished white, incorporating recessed LED downlights.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Emulsioned plastered walls in white/magnolia and grey tones throughout the hall and storage recess.
defects: scuff marks mid to low level left hand side wall P061
scattered scuff and rub marks mid level walls P062
dark scuff marks chest level right hand side P069
shade/rub marks mid level to grey wall P070

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted MDF skirting boards with rounded profile to perimeter of hall and recess.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Oak-effect engineered/laminate plank flooring, pale natural tone, laid throughout hall.

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Marble-effect tiled threshold strip at entrance door, transitioning to communal carpet.

items.name: Entrance door
items.description: Walnut-veneered timber flush entrance door with brass-effect lever handle, euro cylinder lock, thumb-turn and brass-effect letterplate. Painted timber frame in white.

items.name: Letterplate
items.description: Brass-effect horizontal letterplate to entrance door with internal flap.

items.name: Internal door (walnut)
items.description: Walnut-veneered flush internal door with brass-effect hinges, set in painted white frame with moulded architrave.

items.name: Door handle / lock set
items.description: Brass-effect lever handle on rose with thumb-turn cylinder lock to entrance door.
defects: light wear/marking to brass finish on lever P075

items.name: Recessed ceiling downlights
items.description: Recessed LED ceiling downlights to hall ceiling.

items.name: Smoke alarm
items.description: Ceiling-mounted circular white smoke detector.

items.name: Double socket outlets
items.description: Brass/bronze-effect twin switched 13A socket outlets set into walls at low level.

items.name: Light switches
items.description: Polished/black nickel-effect light switch plates, single and quad gang configurations.

items.name: Smart home control panel
items.description: Wall-mounted touchscreen smart-home/control panel with blue display interface, black bezel.

items.name: Entryphone / video intercom
items.description: Wall-mounted video entryphone unit with black bezel and screen.

items.name: Built-in storage cupboard / wardrobe
items.description: Built-in storage recess with painted walls, walnut-effect shelf/rail support, integrated LED strip lighting and hanging rail.
defects: dust and debris to white shelf surface P086

items.name: Clothes hangers
items.description: Set of grey/black plastic clothes hangers on rail within storage recess.

items.name: Loft / access hatch
items.description: Painted ceiling access hatch within upper storage recess.

items.name: Air vent / ventilation grille
items.description: Recessed ventilation grille to upper wall of storage recess.

items.name: Leaning mirror
items.description: Black-framed full-length leaning mirror positioned against wall in hall/reception area.
